rationale: Agriculture & Food has the most direct mapping to a working professional landscape: faculty are organized into agronomy, animal science, food science, plant pathology, etc. — and that's how this user picks. Thirteen subspecialties split by the agricultural object (plant, animal, soil) plus food/nutrition plus systems (sustainability, agroeconomics). I made Aquaculture & Fisheries its own card despite the small size because the community is distinct and identifies hard. Nutrition Science gets its own card — even though it's also mentioned under Public Health Nutrition, the food-science flavor (compounds, bioavailability) is distinct from the public-health flavor (population dietary patterns).

subspecialties.name: Agronomy & Crop Science
covers: agronomy, crop production systems, plant breeding for major crops, crop physiology in production, precision agriculture agronomy
Agron J, Crop Sci, Field Crops Res

subspecialties.name: Plant Pathology & Crop Protection
subspecialties.tagline: Plant disease, pests, integrated pest management.
covers: plant pathology, plant disease resistance, pest management, IPM, agricultural entomology, agricultural mycology applied
Phytopathology, Plant Pathol

subspecialties.name: Soil Science
subspecialties.tagline: Soil fertility, soil biology, pedology, soil-water dynamics.
covers: soil science, soil fertility, soil microbiology applied, pedology, soil-water dynamics, soil carbon management
Soil Sci Soc Am J, Geoderma, Soil Biol Biochem

subspecialties.name: Horticulture, Viticulture & Specialty Crops
subspecialties.tagline: Fruits, vegetables, vines, ornamentals, specialty crops.
covers: pomology, vegetable crops, viticulture and enology, ornamental horticulture, urban agriculture, controlled environment agriculture
Hortic Sci, Sci Hortic
explicitly_excludes: plant biology of these species → Biology

subspecialties.name: Animal & Livestock Science
subspecialties.tagline: Animal nutrition, breeding, husbandry, welfare, dairy.
covers: livestock nutrition, animal breeding, animal husbandry, dairy science, poultry science, livestock welfare, ruminant nutrition
J Anim Sci, J Dairy Sci, Poult Sci
explicitly_excludes: veterinary clinical care → Veterinary Medicine (within this card)

subspecialties.name: Veterinary Medicine & Animal Health
subspecialties.tagline: Veterinary clinical care, animal disease, vet pharmacology.
covers: veterinary clinical medicine, veterinary surgery, veterinary pathology, veterinary microbiology, animal disease (clinical), vet pharmacology

subspecialties.name: Aquaculture & Fisheries Science
subspecialties.tagline: Fish farming, fisheries management, marine harvest sustainability.
covers: aquaculture production, fisheries science applied, fish nutrition, sustainable marine harvest, shellfish culture
Aquaculture, Fish Fish, ICES J Mar Sci

subspecialties.name: Food Science & Engineering
subspecialties.tagline: Food processing, packaging, preservation, food chemistry.
covers: food chemistry, food processing engineering, food packaging, food microbiology applied, food preservation, food rheology
J Food Sci, Food Chem, J Food Eng

subspecialties.name: Food Safety, Quality & Authenticity
subspecialties.tagline: Contaminants, foodborne pathogens, traceability, fraud detection.
covers: foodborne pathogen surveillance, contaminants in food, food authenticity, food traceability, food fraud detection, food allergen research
Food Control, Food Chem food safety

subspecialties.name: Nutrition Science
subspecialties.tagline: Macronutrients, bioactives, gut microbiome diet, RCTs.
covers: nutrient metabolism, food bioactives, dietary intervention trials (mechanism + small RCT), nutrigenomics, gut microbiome and diet
Am J Clin Nutr, J Nutr
explicitly_excludes: population dietary patterns → Public Health (Public Health Nutrition)

subspecialties.name: Sustainable & Regenerative Agriculture
subspecialties.tagline: Agroecology, organic, cover crops, soil carbon, climate-smart.
covers: agroecology, organic agriculture science, regenerative agriculture, cover crops, soil carbon sequestration, climate-smart agriculture, conservation agriculture

subspecialties.name: Agricultural Economics & Policy
subspecialties.tagline: Farm economics, food systems, agricultural trade, rural development.
covers: farm-level economics, food systems economics, agricultural trade and policy, rural development, land-use economics
Am J Agric Econ, Food Policy

subspecialties.name: Agricultural Engineering & Precision Ag
subspecialties.tagline: Ag machinery, sensors, robotics-ag, irrigation engineering.
covers: agricultural machinery, ag sensors, robotics in agriculture, irrigation engineering, post-harvest engineering, smart farming hardware

uncovered_concerns: Considered Cellular/Alternative Proteins as its own card — overlaps Synthetic Biology Engineering (Chem-Bio level 1) and Food Science. For now folds across.
Considered Forestry as its own card — folds under Sustainable & Regenerative Agriculture and Ecology & Evolution.
